name: prep-goal
description: Interrogate a rough objective into a tight, verifiable /goal completion condition before handing it to an autonomous goal loop. Grills one question at a time to pin the real end-state, the proof the evaluator can see, a scope fence, the forbidden cheat, and a turn cap, then emits a short paste-ready /goal line. Built for Claude Code's native /goal; the sharpening technique ports to any autonomous-loop host.
